title: "Success Story: [Your Bot Name/Use Case]"

## Tell us about your bot!
- **What does your bot do?** [Brief description]
- **What scale do you operate at?** [e.g. daily active users, updates/second peak]
- **Target Runtime:** [e.g. Node.js on Kubernetes, Cloudflare Workers, AWS Lambda]

## What did you migrate from?
- **Previous Stack:** [e.g. Telegraf, python-telegram-bot, raw HTTP requests]
- **Why did you decide to migrate?** [e.g. session overwrite bugs, slow cold starts, lack of trace logs]

## The Result
How has switching to TGWrapper changed your development experience or production ops? (e.g. "We went from 3 database concurrency errors daily to zero using Redis CAS sessions", "Incident tracing went from hours of grep to seconds in Datadog").
